title: Malaysian Coconut Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic rice pilaf dish with a hint of Malaysian spices, infused with coconut milk for added creaminess.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add curry powder and sauté for 1 minute.
Add uncooked rice and stir to combine with curry mixture.
Add coconut milk, salt, and curry leaves (if using). Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
